---
description: 'Plan end-to-end development of a new HexGuard package. Delegates to the Package Development Planner agent for comprehensive implementation planning.'
agent: 'package-development-planner'
argument-hint: "Package name or idea to plan (e.g. 'angular-notifications', 'HexGuard.FeatureFlags + @hexguard/angular-feature-flags')"
---

Plan end-to-end development of a new HexGuard package from concept through design, implementation, validation, documentation, demo, and release.

Delegate to the Package Development Planner agent following the custom agent's defined workflow.
